# Ajay Renjith - Lead Developer & Backend Architect

A professional Lead Developer & Backend Architect specializing in scaling backend architectures, Django REST Framework, Python FastAPI, Next.js/React.js frontend systems, AWS basics, and secure VPS hosting environments.

## Technical Stack & Competencies

### Frontend Engineering
* React.js, Next.js, Vue.js, JavaScript (ES6+), HTML5, CSS3, Responsive Web UI

### Backend & API Design
* Python, Django REST Framework, FastAPI, Node.js, RESTful API Engineering, System Architecture

### Cloud & Infrastructure
* PostgreSQL, MySQL, Linux VPS Hosting Management (Hostinger), AWS Basics, Server Architecture, CI/CD

### Technical Leadership
* Engineering Team Management (25+ members), Agile & Scrum, Technical Client Advisory, Technical SEO

---

## Professional Journey

### Lead Developer — MarketBytes | Infopark, Cherthala (June 2024 — June 2026)
* Direct and manage a high-capacity engineering division comprising 25+ technical team members, supervising cross-functional workflow management, technical delivery timelines, and performance evaluations.
* Architect and coordinate the deployment of end-to-end full-stack web environments utilizing Python (Django/FastAPI) backends linked to responsive Next.js/React.js client interfaces.
* Serve as the chief client-facing technical consultant, gathering intricate system specifications from international clients and rendering them into resilient technical pipelines.
* Govern server infrastructure landscapes on Hostinger VPS and AWS environments, maintaining system security patches, optimization protocols, and maximum operational uptime.

### Senior Developer — PixelBoho | Kochi, India (August 2023 — May 2024)
* Engineered custom frontend applications using React.js, targeting performance bottlenecks, web vitals optimization, and highly modular component development.
* Constructed clean, maintainable, and deeply scalable custom APIs and microservices utilizing Django REST Framework to handle multi-tenant platforms.
* Collaborated with design stakeholders to execute pixel-perfect, highly accessible responsive layouts across diverse user configurations.

### Junior Developer — Ezer Developers | Kochi, India (May 2023 — August 2023)
* Developed clean, documented modular interface components using JavaScript, basic React.js, and standardized backend practices.
* Assisted senior staff in regular server migrations, system hosting setups on commercial VPS systems, and custom domain routing.
* Refactored legacy codebases to improve processing latency, optimize raw SQL query lines, and correct operational software bugs.
